title: hedyotis thymifolia var. ericoides
intro: Hedyotis thymifolia var. ericoides, also known as He Shou Wu or Fo-Ti, is a plant species within the family Rubiaceae and is native to East Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and cardiovascular-protective effects. The health benefits of Hedyotis thymifolia var. ericoides include its potential to promote longevity, improve cognitive function, and support the health of the cardiovascular and nervous systems. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, capsules, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being and vitality.
